mapper.select: select id, user_id, amount,payment_period,payment_id, payment_type,order_type, status, description,order_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from `order` where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select * from `order` where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 for update

select o.id as orderId, o.payment_period as payCycle, o.amount as price, o.status, o.payment_period as payCycle, c.commodity_name as commodityName, c.description as commodityDesc, c.bandwidth as bandwidth, orr.resources_ip as ip, o.order_type, o.user_id from `order` o join order_renewal_resources orr on o.id=orr.order_id join server_resources sr on orr.resources_id = sr.id join commodity c on sr.commodity_id = c.id where o.id = #{id} and o.user_id = #{userId} and o.is_deleted = 0

select o.id as orderId, o.status, payment_period as payCycle, amount as price, c.commodity_name as commodityName, c.description as commodityDesc, c.bandwidth as bandwidth, o.order_type, o.user_id from `order` o join order_commodity oc on o.id = oc.order_id join commodity c on oc.commodity_id = c.id where o.id = #{id} and o.user_id = #{userId} and o.is_deleted = 0
select id, user_id,status,amount, status,description, order_time,order_type,payment_period, payment_type from `order` where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update `order` set user_id =#{et.userId}, amount=#{et.amount}, description=#{et.description}, `status`=#{et.status}, order_time=#{et.orderTime}, payment_type=#{et.paymentType}, is_deleted=#{et.isDeleted}, create_user=#{et.createUser}, update_user=#{et.updateUser}, create_time=#{et.createTime}, update_time=#{et.updateTime} where id = #{et.id}
mapper.insert: insert into `order`(id,user_id, amount, status,description,order_type,payment_period,payment_id, payment_type,order_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{userId}, #{amount}, #{status},#{description},#{orderType},#{paymentPeriod},#{paymentId},#{paymentType}, #{orderTime}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into `order`(id,user_id, amount, status,description,payment_id, payment_type, order_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.amount}, #{entity.status},#{entity.description},#{entity.paymentId},#{entity.paymentType}, #{entity.orderTime}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into `order`(id,user_id, amount, status,description,payment_id, payment_type, order_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.amount}, #{entity.status},#{entity.description},#{entity.paymentId},#{entity.paymentType}, #{entity.orderTime}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), amount = values(amount), status = values(status), order_time = values(order_time), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.select: select id, user_id, amount, payment_period, payment_id, payment_type, order_type, status, description, order_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and status = 'WAIT_PAY' and order_type = #{orderType} and order_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE)

select o.id, o.user_id, o.amount, o.payment_period, o.payment_id, o.payment_type, o.order_type, o.status, o.description, o.order_time, o.is_deleted, o.create_user, o.update_user, o.create_time, o.update_time from `order` o inner join order_pay_type opt on o.id = opt.order_id where o.is_deleted = 0 and opt.retry_count < 9 and o.status in ('COMPLETED', 'WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES', 'USER_CANCELED','CANCELED_TIMEOUT') and opt.is_check = 0 and (opt.wx_order_id is not null and opt.wx_order_id != '' or opt.alipay_order_id is not null and opt.alipay_order_id != '') limit #{limit}

select id, user_id, amount, payment_period, payment_id, payment_type, order_type, status, description, order_time, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and status = 'WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES' and order_type = 'add'

select id, user_id, amount, payment_period, payment_id, payment_type, order_type, status, description, order_time,refound_to_balance, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and status = 'WAIT_REFUND' limit #{limit}

select id, user_id, amount, payment_period, payment_id, payment_type, order_type, status, description, order_time, refound_to_balance, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from `order` where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 for update
select count(1) from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and date(create_time) = curdate()
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and date(create_time) = curdate()
select count(1) from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m')
select ifnull(sum(amount), 0) from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') = date_format(curdate(), '%Y-%m')
select ifnull(count(1),0) from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and status = 'WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES'
select count(1) from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and status = 'WAIT_REFUND'

select date(create_time) as name, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as amount, count(1) as orderCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'renew' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as renewCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'add' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as addCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'add' then amount else 0 end), 0) as addAmount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'renew' then amount else 0 end), 0) as renewAmount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'recharge' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as rechargeCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'recharge' then amount else 0 end), 0) as rechargeAmount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'quote' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as quoteCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'quote' then amount else 0 end), 0) as quoteAmount from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and status in ('WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES', 'COMPLETED') and create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 30 day) group by date(create_time) order by name asc

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') as name, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as amount, count(1) as orderCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'renew' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as renewCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'add' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as addCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'add' then amount else 0 end), 0) as addAmount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'renew' then amount else 0 end), 0) as renewAmount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'recharge' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as rechargeCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'recharge' then amount else 0 end), 0) as rechargeAmount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'quote' then 1 else 0 end), 0) as quoteCount, ifnull(sum(case when order_type = 'quote' then amount else 0 end), 0) as quoteAmount from `order` where is_deleted = 0 and status in ('WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES', 'COMPLETED') and create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 12 month) group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m') order by name asc

select cc.id as categoryId, cc.category_name as categoryName, count(oc.id) as salesCount from `order` o inner join order_commodity oc on o.id = oc.order_id inner join commodity c on oc.commodity_id = c.id inner join commodity_category cc on c.category_id = cc.id where o.is_deleted = 0 and oc.is_deleted = 0 and c.is_deleted = 0 and cc.is_deleted = 0 and o.status in ('WAIT_ALLOCATION_RESOURCES', 'COMPLETED') and o.order_type in ('add', 'renew') and o.create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 30 day) group by cc.id, cc.category_name order by salesCount desc limit 5
